creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Piotr Kubaj from comment #13)
> Sure.
> It built:

Great, thank you, Piotr!

As you've seen, I started to apply this last simplification/fix to
lang/gcc7-devel and lang/gcc8-devel and I'll address lang/gcc9-devel
and then others over the next days.  The other changes we discussed
are then covered by PR 235975, so closing this one for now.
